user.message.description: Route user messages to appropriate handler based on intent classification

isc.rule.changed.description: ISC rule changed (summary) — trigger ISC rule check via skill handler

isc.rule.*.description: ISC rule changes — check rules and trigger downstream sync

dto.task.completed.description: DTO task completed — process downstream via DTO skill handler

dto.task.created.description: DTO task created — acknowledged by DTO skill handler

dto.sync.*.description: DTO sync lifecycle events — handled by DTO skill handler

cras.knowledge.learned.description: CRAS knowledge learned — trigger CRAS analysis pipeline

cras.insight.generated.description: CRAS insights — feed to CRAS for processing and ISC feedback

aeo.evaluation.completed.description: AEO evaluation completed — feed results to CRAS for learning

aeo.assessment.completed.description: AEO assessment results ingested by CRAS

aeo.assessment.failed.description: Failed assessments get CRAS analysis for root cause

seef.skill.published.description: SEEF skill published — CRAS records the publish event for knowledge tracking

seef.skill.optimized.description: SEEF optimization results fed to CRAS for learning

skill.lifecycle.*.description: P0 gate check for skill lifecycle events (arch.gate-before-action-001)

design.document.*.description: P0 gate check for design document events

system.day.closure_requested.description: P0 gate check for day closure

user.intent.*.description: L3 detected user intents dispatched for execution

evolver.insight.detected.description: [Day3-Gap2] Evolver洞察 → 自动响应管道 (事件驱动主路径，取代独立Cron触发)

cras.insight.critical.description: [Day3-Gap2] CRAS关键洞察 → 自动响应管道 (事件驱动主路径)

system.metric.threshold_exceeded.description: [Day3-Gap2] 系统指标越界 → 自动响应管道 (事件驱动主路径)

cras.insight.request.description: [Day3-Gap2] CRAS洞察请求 → 事件驱动触发用户洞察分析 (取代30分钟Cron直接调用)

system.health.request.description: [Day3-Gap2] 系统健康检查请求 → 事件驱动触发 (Cron仅做兜底)
